name: KP Sharma Oli
reason: Court extended detention for 2 more days. Attended hearing virtually from hospital. Investigation continues into 'Criminal Negligence' during the 2025 uprising.

name: Ramesh Lekhak
reason: Detention extended by 2 days. Investigators are currently recording detailed statements regarding the September 2025 crackdown orders.

name: Deepak Bhatta
reason: Detained from Naxal in a major money laundering probe (Rs 450M suspicious transfer). Alleged link between political elite and illicit financial layering.

name: Deepak Khadka
reason: Money laundering probe; currently receiving medical treatment for health complications while in custody.

name: Chhabilal Rijal
reason: Released on Tuesday after recording statements; must appear before authorities when summoned regarding the 2025 crackdown.
